plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-403 RP13.P05.M04.S06-RP13.P06.M01.S12 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-403 implements descriptor-only coverage that closes the RP13.P05 phase (M04 Secondary Workflow Slice tail, M05 Permission And Audit Binding, M06 Synthetic Fixture Set, M07 Test And Golden Case Set, M08 Hermes Evidence Packet, M09 Claude Review Packet, M10 Closeout And Next Handoff) and opens the RP13.P06 foundation (M00 Scope Inventory, M01 Contract Draft head) as nine descriptor-only sections over 150 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H13), Claude review packet (C13), and CP00-404 handoff, without opening payments, payment matching, AR aging, or journal entry runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-403 is a descriptor-only RP13 payments-core pack (Risk C, 150 units, RP13.P05.M04.S06-RP13.P06.M01.S12) reviewed read-only via Read/Grep/Glob. Verified strong internal consistency: the CP403 pack binding (registry.js:188), requirements (registry.js:1200), no-write attestation (registry.js:1194), service descriptor/case-set factories (service.js:1474,1507), validators (validators.js:2042-2201), contract projection (payments-core-contract.json current_pack, cp403_requirements, cp403_no_write_attestation, p05_closeout_p06_foundation_descriptor, historical_pack_bindings tail), manifest, and the live closeout-pack-plan all agree on pack_id, risk C, 150 units, range, upstream CP00-402, next CP00-404, next_subphase RP13.P06.M01.S13. Deliverable distribution (fixture 43, claude_review 7, implementation 57, security_audit 16, test 18, hermes_evidence 6, ui 3 = 150) and micro-phase/micro-title row counts match across all artifacts; independently spot-counted claude_review=7, ui=3, hermes_evidence=6, and confirmed M04 section rows map exactly to plan units S06-S20 with no off-by-one. All 7 required public exports are defined and re-exported through src/index.js and imported by the passing test suite. Descriptor-only invariants (descriptor_only true, runtime_execution false, customer_safe_errors_only true, raw_payload_included false) are enforced per-row by validatePaymentsCoreCp403P05CloseoutP06FoundationDescriptor. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are comprehensively attested (all dispatch_*_runtime, db/storage/audit/permission-write flags false; no_real_data true; emits_hermes_runtime_receipt false), so Hermes (H13) is used only for deterministic evidence-packet/receipt descriptors, not product runtime. Authority boundary holds: claude_is_final_approval false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening true. The pack makes no affirmative production_ready claim (manifest production_ready:false, status implemented_pending_review; hermes production_ready_candidate:true reflects descriptor-coverage validity only), so there is no over-claim of enterprise trust. CP178+ review hardening checks pass: readiness auth preflight succeeded (exit 0, 1450-byte valid-JSON stdout), validation-report shows forbidden_tools_present false and summary_only_review_allowed false (correctly prohibited for Risk C + security/review deliverables), prompt within size limit, source_inspection_mode read_tools_used, and no pre-baked raw-output.json/review-receipt.json exist (this review is fresh). command-evidence records npm test, npm run validate, rp13:payments-core:validate, closeout-pack-plan:validate, weighted/spec/fullplan/goal:closeout/rp00:control-plane validate, build, and git diff --check all at exit 0, with post-review gated commands correctly deferred. One non-blocking P3 metadata note on the changed-file-scope bundle. Recommend pack closeout proceed to the human/final-approval gate; Claude remains read-only reviewer, not final approver.

findings.title: changed-file-scope.json double-classifies the pack's own manifest dir and handoff doc as both implementation and unrelated
findings.details: docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md and docs/closeout-packs/cp00-403/ are listed in untracked_implementation_files (lines 130-133) and simultaneously in unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (lines 135-145). docs/closeout-packs/cp00-403/ is the pack's own manifest/command-evidence deliverable, so labeling it 'unrelated' is internally inconsistent. This is review-tooling metadata only and has no effect on descriptor coverage, no-write/no-real-data boundaries, authority boundaries, or any pack deliverable; all substantive bindings and validations are correct.
findings.recommendation: Have the changed-file-scope generator exclude active-pack paths (docs/closeout-packs/<pack_id>/ and the active handoff doc) from unrelated_dirty_files_preserved so downstream consumers are not ambiguous about pack membership. Non-blocking for CP00-403 closeout.
findings.post_review_disposition: Acknowledged as benign review-tooling metadata overlap; does not block CP00-403 pack or goal closeout and requires no change to pack deliverables. Suggested as a future scope-generator cleanup.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-403 payments core p05 closeout p06 foundation descriptor pack
